intent: Convert remaining Markdown-shaped harness state surfaces into JSON authority and tracking objects without changing project intent or adding new runtime workflow scope.

invariant_constraints: Keep the first proven workflow PM-only and read-only except for run artifact writes.
Preserve JSON as the authoritative runtime artifact format where the source is object-shaped.
Do not add apply workflow execution, new agents, new permissions, or implementation mutation authority.
task_constraints: Create active JSON implementation plan and tracker objects using Markdown donor files.
Create JSON templates in the implementation-projects templates folder.
Convert open decisions and known failures from Markdown donor files into JSON.
Prune old hyphen or Markdown fallback paths from runtime source routing.
Track remaining Markdown-to-JSON seams, including agent prompts and archive policy work owned by the user.

admissibility_checks.basis: The work stays inside JSON authority/source routing cleanup and does not add runtime workflow scope.

stop_conditions: Requested work expands beyond source conversion and routing cleanup.
Requested work adds apply workflow execution or agent file mutation.

planned_work.description: Create active JSON implementation plan and tracker files for the Markdown-to-JSON conversion bundle.
Add JSON implementation plan and tracker templates under harness/implementation-projects/templates.
Populate open_decisions.json from the Markdown donor.
Populate known_failures.json from the Markdown donor.
Remove old hyphen and root fallback paths for open decisions and known failures from the context compiler.
Include active implementation plan and tracker JSON files as optional context packet sources.

non_goals: Do not add apply workflow execution.
Do not add new agent routes or permissions.
Do not convert user-owned agent prompt/archive policy work in this bundle.
acceptance_criteria: Active implementation plan and tracker exist as JSON.
Implementation plan and tracker templates exist as JSON.
Open decisions and known failures load as non-empty JSON objects.
Context compiler source routing prefers only snake_case JSON authority paths for open decisions and known failures.
Compiler smoke check includes project spec, governance primitives, runtime policy, runtime budget, open decisions, known failures, active plan, and active tracker as JSON sources.

known_live_probe.result: First PM slice is live-wired at the scaffold/runtime level; broader implementation claims remain unauthorized.

assumptions_and_unknowns: Agent prompt Markdown conversion is intentionally left as a user-owned outstanding seam.
Archive policy Markdown conversion is intentionally left as a user-owned outstanding seam.
completion_rule: Do not mark behavior complete on fixture, mock, dry-run, serialization, type, field, file, path, route, crate, config, or nominal-caller evidence alone.
closeout_note: When this bundle completes, move it from active to archive.
